name: M5Stack Unit 8 Angle
description: The `m5stack_8angle` platform allows to use the [m5angle](https://docs.m5stack.com/en/unit/UNIT%208Angle) input device with ESPHome. It has 8 knobs, a switch and can individually drive 9 RGB LEDs.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: Manually specify the I²C address of the device. Defaults to `0x43`.

config_entries.label: I2C ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [I²C Component](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) if you need

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.
